title: Remove 'Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?' section from Health Remedies page

requirements.text: Remove the 'Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?' section from the HealthRemediesPage.tsx component while preserving the hero section and the five subcategory cards (Immunity Boosting, Digestion & Gut Health, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP Support, Stress & Sleep Solutions)

quotes:
can remove the part
Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?' section is completely removed from HealthRemediesPage.tsx
The hero section with heading and description remains visible
All five subcategory cards remain functional and clickable
The page layout remains visually balanced after section removal
No console errors or broken styling after the removal

constraints: Do not modify the subcategory cards or their navigation functionality
Preserve the hero section at the top of the page
Maintain the Ayurvedic design theme and styling consistency
nonGoals: Removing similar sections from other category pages (Skin Care, Hair Care)
Adding new content to replace the removed section
Modifying the subcategory routing or detail pages
